params.name: Imperial Jade
params.source: Fragment Crafting (20.7%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Wishing (0.75%), Cathay Treasure Maps (5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Feb 23, AD 191, this jade seal, which was a symbol of kingship, reappeared.

Imperial Jade is a symbol of the reign and dreamt by all warlords. Yet, it also brings all kinds of misfortune to those who own it. 

[Ominous Tales]

King Li of Chu broke the legs of the Jade Presenter Bian. Minister Lin of Zhao was nearly killed because of the jade. First Emperor of Qin sacrificed the seal to the River God to escape death. Empress Wang broke the curse by smashing the seal. General Sun was ambushed  …
